scenario_config.name: before_pg_tuning_ingest_isolation
_comparison_notes: traffic shape; only difference is the pg-defaults overlay, which strips
the -c synchronous_commit=off and other tuning flags from the postgres
command, leaving PG 16 at its out-of-the-box defaults.
Run both and diff via benchmarks/compare_reports.py.
